title: Crew Roles Distribution
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM CrewMemberRoleChange WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Role AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM CrewMemberRoleChange WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Role UNION ALL SELECT Role AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ChangeCrewRole WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Role ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} crew role assignment(s) during the report period. Role distribution reveals what kind of multicrew experience you create and seek — a Gunner-heavy chart means combat-focused multicrew; Fighter Con dominance means you run fighter wing operations; Helm time means you've been trusted with direct ship control.
details.help: CrewMemberRoleChange tracks crew role changes on your ship; ChangeCrewRole your own role changes. total drives the title.

tagLines: Multicrew role distribution log compiled. Role assignment frequency noted in the crew operations record.
Every role was filled by someone who chose it. The distribution shows what your sessions were designed for.
Gunner, fighter controller, helm. Three very different jobs. The chart shows which was in demand.
